title: Database connection failure - cascading service outage
description: Primary database server became unreachable due to network misconfiguration, causing all dependent services to timeout
root_cause: Network switch misconfiguration caused interface to shut down, disrupting database connectivity
closure_notes: Restarted network switch, verified routing tables, implemented automated failover, added monitoring alerts

title: Memory leak in authentication service
description: User-service gradually consuming more memory over 8 hours until OOM kill triggered
root_cause: Authentication token cache not properly evicting expired entries, causing unbounded memory growth
closure_notes: Implemented LRU eviction policy on token cache, added memory usage monitoring, deployed memory limits

title: Load balancer misconfiguration
description: Traffic unevenly distributed across backend instances causing some servers to be overwhelmed
root_cause: Load balancer weights not updated after infrastructure scaling event
closure_notes: Reconfigured load balancer weights, updated auto-scaling policies, implemented traffic distribution monitoring

title: Database query performance degradation
description: Payment-api queries taking 3-5 seconds instead of typical 200ms, causing cascading timeouts
root_cause: Missing database indexes on frequently queried columns combined with query plan regression
closure_notes: Added indexes on payment_id, user_id, and timestamp columns, optimized query plans, cleared query cache

title: Timeout due to slow database queries
description: Unable to establish database connection within timeout window due to query queue buildup
root_cause: Missing database indexes on frequently queried columns causing table scans
closure_notes: Added proper indexes, optimized query execution plans, tested query performance under load

title: Load balancer overwhelmed
description: One backend instance marked unhealthy but not removed from pool, causing 50% traffic rejection
root_cause: One backend instance marked unhealthy but not removed from active pool in load balancer
closure_notes: Fixed health check configuration, manually removed unhealthy instance, verified all servers responding
